title: Sweet Smoky American Dried Apricots Tart
description: A unique dessert that combines the sweetness of dried apricots with a smoky lacquer glaze, perfect for a sweet treat.

ingredients.name: 1 egg replacement (e.g. flax or chia egg)

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, confectioners' sugar, and salt.
Add unsalted butter and use a pastry blender or your fingers to work it into the flour mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Press mixture into a 9-inch (23cm) tart pan with a removable bottom.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly golden.
Allow to cool completely on a wire rack.
Meanwhile, combine dried apricots, egg replacement, and maple syrup in a blender or food processor and blend until smooth.
Add vanilla extract and blend until combined.
Arrange the apricot mixture on top of the cooled tart crust.
Bake for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the apricots are tender.
Allow to cool completely on a wire rack.
To make lacquer glaze, mix together 1 tablespoon maple syrup and 1 tablespoon water in a small bowl.
Brush glaze over the top of the tart to create a shiny, lacquer-like finish.
